notes: Stage-14 semantic grounding hardening line on MiniMind2 104M / 768dim
Adds engineered-true no-hints oversampling to counter the strong non-engineered class skew
Extends repair supervision across no-hints true-holdout families instead of only the default train phrasing
Keeps v13 as the farther unseen true holdout while tightening the finalizer with traceable semantic projection
